title: Calyptridium martirense
taxonomy: Calyptridium martirense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Montiaceae, which is a family of succulent plants. It belongs to the genus Calyptridium, which is a group of small, delicate plants. Calyptridium martirense is native to Chile and is often found in arid regions. This species is typically characterized by its small size and vibrant flowers, which are often pink or yellow in color. Calyptridium martirense is considered a rare and unique species within the world of succulents.
